name: Faceman
description: Spend 2 karma to pass a charm or deception test as long as you have a good cover story or identity.

name: Strategist
description: Pay 3 karma to play out a flashback. Roll 1D6 — on 4, 5, or 6 it occurs in your favor. On a fail, something bad happens.

name: Master Detective
description: Pay 1 karma to automatically pass an investigation or perception test.

name: Connected
description: Pay 2 karma. If there is a crowd around, you have a friend among them who can help. They may have a price.

name: Lie Detector
description: Passive — no karma cost. You always know when someone is lying to you.

name: Hard to Kill
description: Pay 2 karma as a reaction to being attacked. Take half damage from all attacks until your next turn.
